subject: Materials for Discussion of Reg CB MY Offshore Plan - 26 May 2025
deck_filename: Reg CB - Discussion of MY Offshore Plan - 26 May 2025.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Pls find attached deck for Discussion of Reg CB MY Offshore Plan next Mon
26 May, 230pm.

The plan is to align with you first, then share the updates with Terence
after reg team PML meeting, 4pm on the same day

*Meeting Agenda *

   - Recap of MY offshore plan
   - Reg CB Team updated structure
   - SIP/SLS team structure, role scope and justification
   - SIP Commercial - SG > MY offshore plan
   - Timeline for the MY offshore team

Let me know if you have any questions, thank you.

*Emily Lin, 林佑容*
Shopee | People Team

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 2

   - So we are ok to keep at 103 HC as compared to the budget of 115?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

For HC revision, we are working with all sub team leads to break down job
scopes by team members and further assess whether we need to scale up to
meet the HC target or if there's room to revise it downward

we may need some time to gather all the necessary info and align with Kel
Jin/Shuning, target is to get back to you for your review by this friday.
*Emily Lin, 林佑容*
Shopee | People Team
